target.name: LAF Software Reasoning Engine V1
target.goal: A local-first, deterministic software-engineering reasoning platform built on the existing Roslyn symbol foundation (KE-008/KE-010), answering concrete engineering questions with no Ollama and no Qdrant required; an optional local model only enriches explanations.
questionsAnswered: What breaks if X changes? (blast radius)
What approved knowledge applies to this task?
Have we fixed something like this before?
Which template produced this generated file?

components.name: CodeGraph
components.summary: In-memory CodeGraphModel + CodeNode + CodeEdge + CodeGraphBuilder over the deterministic syntax-only CSharpSymbolExtractor; roles controller/service/dbcontext/entity/test; edges Contains/References/Inherits/Implements/UsesEntity/UsesDbSet/TestCovers; transitive impact; external nodes for out-of-corpus base types.

components.name: Retrieval
components.summary: SoftwareReasoningService: FindSymbol/FindImpact/FindTestsForChange/FindKnowledgeForTask/FindGeneratorTemplateForFile/FindPriorSimilarFix/BuildReasoningContext; KnowledgeIndex deterministic keyword index over pack JSON.

components.name: Safety
components.summary: SafeToolGateway: CommandRiskClassifier default-deny with 4 tiers (ReadOnly/SafeValidation/ControlledWrite/Forbidden); PathSandboxGuard blocks absolute + '..' traversal; controlled writes require a worktree; every decision logged.

components.name: LocalModels
components.summary: LocalModelRouter: role roster qwen=CodeReviewer, deepseek-r1=Planner/AgentReviewer, nomic-embed=Embedding; health probe; AvailableAsync; ReviewAsync degrades gracefully and never throws when Ollama absent; NullModelClient default; injectable ILocalModelClient.

components.name: AgentRunner
components.summary: IsolatedPatchRunner: validates every write path via the gateway BEFORE writing, snapshots originals, applies inside a worktree, builds+tests via an injected IValidationExecutor, rolls back on failure, records success/failure experience, has NO commit/push capability.

components.name: Benchmark
components.summary: Builds the graph over the real repo and answers a 15-task suite with no model.

perComponentTargets.note: The ambitious per-component targets below were NOT individually met. A cohesive, tested engine was delivered at lower counts.

honestLimitations: PILOT_READY, not GA: 14 of 15 benchmark tasks answered (93.3%).
Per-component test targets not individually met; delivered at lower counts (124 tests total).
Retrieval is keyword/term-overlap, not embeddings/vector ranking.
Graph is syntax-only; reference resolution is name-based, no full semantic type resolution.
Model-enriched path is optional and not validated end-to-end against a live Ollama this sprint.
AgentRunner cannot commit or push by design; validated via an abstracted executor, not real dotnet in CI.
